message:
test(fcp-conformance/host-mcp-content): pin McpContentBlock + McpToolCallResponse + McpToolAnnotations agent-facing wire format (resolves flywheel_connectors-6eqw8)

21 tests pinning the three closely-coupled MCP response primitives.

- McpContentBlock 3 internally-tagged variants with type tags
  'text'/'image'/'resource' (NOT camelCase enum identifiers);
  Image.mime_type → 'mimeType' camelCase rename; Resource optional
  fields skip when None; constructors produce matching variants;
  predicates exclusive (exactly one is_text/is_image/is_resource
  holds per block); as_text returns Some only for Text; full serde
  roundtrip identity for each variant; rejects unknown type tag
- McpToolCallResponse text/error/with_content constructors; is_error
  field omitted from JSON when false (default suppression); appears
  as 'isError' camelCase when true; full serde roundtrip
- McpToolAnnotations all-None serializes to "{}"; populated fields
  use camelCase rename (riskLevel, safetyTier, readOnly, etc.); None
  fields omitted; full 6-field serde roundtrip identity
- Caught: McpToolAnnotations has no Default impl AND uses camelCase
  rename (not snake_case)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
